---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for UrbanNeeds
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: spatchava
---

## Problem / motivation
What problem are you trying to solve? Who does it affect?

## Proposed solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches you've considered and why they're insufficient.

## User stories
- As a [user type], I want [goal] so that [benefit].

## Mockups / references
Screenshots, links, or references to similar features in other apps.

## Additional context
Add any other context, constraints, or dependencies here.
